comment: Validated metrics from Grafana dashboards (mysql_dashboard.json). Metrics collected from MySQL exporter and chaos-toolkit instrumentation.

rate(db_query_count_total{db_system=\"my.description: Query execution rate per second (measures database responsiveness and throughput)

rate(db_query_latency_bucket{db_system=\.description: Query latency histogram (use with histogram_quantile for percentiles)

db_connection_pool_utilization_percent{d.description: Connection pool utilization percentage (0-100) - indicates remaining capacity

rate(db_transaction_deadlocks_total{db_s.description: Transaction deadlock rate (should be minimal in healthy system)

extended_metrics.description: Extended metrics that may be available from MySQL exporter (optional, for enhanced monitoring)

available_metrics.name: mysql_innodb_rows_read_total
available_metrics.description: Total InnoDB rows read (use with rate())

available_metrics.name: mysql_innodb_rows_updated_total
available_metrics.description: Total InnoDB rows updated (use with rate())

available_metrics.name: mysql_innodb_rows_deleted_total
available_metrics.description: Total InnoDB rows deleted (use with rate())

notes.query_latency_histogram: The db_query_latency_bucket metric is a histogram. Use histogram_quantile(0.95, rate(db_query_latency_bucket{db_system="mysql"}[1m])) to calculate 95th percentile latency.
notes.database_filter: MySQL metrics are collected from the MySQL exporter and labeled with db_system="mysql" for consistency with the chaos-toolkit instrumentation.
notes.pool_exhaustion_threshold: Connection pool utilization >80% indicates approaching saturation. >90% is critical.
notes.deadlock_threshold: Deadlock rates >1/sec indicate serious lock contention issues. Investigate and optimize queries.
notes.all_metrics_validated: All metrics in this file are validated against mysql_dashboard.json Grafana dashboard
